app.title: KioskKit
deviceList.title: Devices
deviceList.table.name: Name
deviceDetail.notFoundDescription: This device could not be found. It may have been removed.
deviceDetail.offline.title: Device is offline
deviceDetail.offline.description: The management interface is available when the device is connected to the network.
deviceDetail.appNotConnected.title: App not connected
deviceDetail.appNotConnected.description: The device is on the network but the kiosk app is not responding.
backups.title: Backups
backups.empty: No backups yet. Backups run daily when your device is online.
backups.restoreDialog.title: Restore backup?
backups.restoreDialog.description: This will replace all data on {deviceName} with the backup from {time}. The current data will be backed up automatically before the restore.
ota.installDialog.title: Install Update & Reboot
ota.installDialog.description: The device will be offline for approximately 1–2 minutes during the update. If the update fails, the device will automatically roll back to the previous version.
addDevice.title: Add Device
addDevice.description: Enter the 9-digit pairing code shown on your device's screen.
addDevice.error: Invalid or already claimed pairing code.
